ddt:Target.Name: TCU_L38EVChina_V1.85
ddt:Target.Description:
---------------------------------------------------------- --- TCU L38EV China SKD --- ----------------------------------------------------------
[20170425] V1.79 DTC addition Applicabiliyt : > from SW502
[20170320] V1.78 Request, Data, screen, DID modification Applicability : > from SW5 for LR PT2
[20170124] V1.76 Request,Data, screen, DID modification Applicability : > from SW4 for LRPT1
[20160603] V1.2 Request, Data, Screen modification Applicaility : > from SW3 for SRPT1
[20160429] V1.1 Request,Data,Screen modification Applicability : > from SW3 for SR PT1
[20160223] V1.0 New database version Applicability : > from SW2

Data.Name: WCDMAReceptionLevel
Data.Comment: 0: no signal | 31: excellent signal (maximum displayed value) | 99: not detectable

Data.Name: routine.server_Status
Data.Comment: Send all the datas to the GDC Server

Item.Text: Time synchronisation with server1(operator server) activated
Time synchronisation with server1(operator server) activated and with GPS if no service on Server 1 is active
Time synchronisation with server1(operator server) activated and with GPS

Data.Name: Temperature probe number with minimum temperature
Temperature probe number with maximum temperature

Item.Text: Vehicle not locked from the outside by the customer
Vehicle Locked from the outside by the customer
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Valid Airbag Info pendant t=60 sec

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: No retry until next ON cycle
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
not available (init or lever switched failure)
No ET Alert Isolation Level 1 Requested
No ET Alert Isolation Level 2 Requested
No ET Alert Motor Default Requested
No ET Alert Performance limitation Lv1 Requested
ET Alert Performance limitation Lv1 Requested
No ET Alert DCDC Default Requested
No HV Battery Low Display Requested
No ESP in failure display request

Data.Name: Date of manufacture of battery pack

List.Item: Response to control status when test in progress

Data.Name: Battery cell number with minimum voltage
Battery cell number with the maximum voltage

Item.Text: No ET Alert Repair ETS Default Requested
ET Alert Repair ETS Default Requested
No EBV in failure display request

List.Item: Response to control status when test in progress

Item.Text: no Crash Detection Out Of Order

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request for old ECU

DataItem.Name: Temperature probe number with minimum temperature
Temperature probe number with maximum temperature
Battery cell number with minimum voltage
Battery cell number with the maximum voltage

Request.Name: IOCBLID.GPS Power on off check request
IOCBLID.GPS Power on off check stop
IOCBLID.3G power on off check request
IOCBLID.3G power on off check request stop

Test.Description: Battery level too low (<6.5V) for more than 1s
Battery level too high (>16V) for more than 1s
CAN-V lines are detected SC or OC
CAN-EL lines are detected SC or OC
Internal battery failure or end of life

Display.DataName: Temperature probe number with minimum temperature
Temperature probe number with maximum temperature
Battery cell number with minimum voltage
Battery cell number with the maximum voltage
